title: senecio spinosus
intro: Senecio spinosus, also known as the Prickly Groundsel or Cape Thistle, is a spiny, annual or biennial herb native to South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Senecio spinosus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Senecio spinosus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures and infusions for its medicinal properties.
